repair_cycle_notes: Cycle 1 (Option H bulk targeted fix): Main-session structural sweep caught SYSTEMATIC OE-domain TABLE_ROW + TABLE_HEADER corruption in 31a p.302-304 that Rule A 1/page sample (slot #40 pr-review-toolkit:silent-failure-hunter) detected only in 1 atom (atom 2 ig34_p0302_a009). Bulk sweep revealed 10 affected atoms across 3 distinct motifs: (a) OESEQ → OESEO Q→O Latin-Latin adjacent-key substitution in 8 atoms (a002 + a009 + a010 + a021 + a003 + a004 + a014 + a025); (b) Cyrillic У → Latin U homoglyph in 2 TABLE_HEADERs (a021 + a025) — NEW2 substitution list (А Е О Р С Т Х) does NOT include У; (c) SUPPQUAL Example 3 multi-axis stale-template IDVAR/QNAM in 2 atoms (a023 = OESEO+OEEDILST should be OELNKID+OEEVLDTC; a024 = OESEO+OAEYLDTC should be OELNKID+OEEVLDTC). Plus inline (d) TABLE_HEADER OESTRESN duplicated where OESTRESU should be (a014 — co-fixed in same Option H call). Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_31a.jsonl.pre-OptionH-OE-corruption-bulk.bak. Post-fix: 0 OESEO + 0 Cyrillic У remaining; 8 OESEQ canonical present; a014/a023/a024 verified against PDF p.303 ground truth; schema integrity CLEAN; 259 atoms preserved (139 + 120). Findings O-P1-101..104 documenting all 4 motifs.

findings_added.category: writer-family R10 strict no-paraphrase violation — SYSTEMATIC OESEQ → OESEO Q→O Latin-Latin adjacent-key substitution + co-located OESTRESN duplicate column (TABLE_HEADER eye-skip)
findings_added.title: SYSTEMATIC OE-domain Identifier corruption: OESEQ → OESEO Q→O Latin-Latin adjacent-key swap across 8 atoms in p.302-304 OE Examples tables + a014 TABLE_HEADER duplicate OESTRESN where OESTRESU should be
findings_added.scope: 8 atoms across §6.3.7.5 OE Examples (Example 1 / Example 2 / Example 3 / Example 4) tables: ig34_p0302_a002 (TABLE_HEADER oe.xpt), p0302_a009 (TABLE_ROW Row 1), p0302_a010 (TABLE_ROW Row 2), p0302_a021 (TABLE_HEADER oe.xpt Example 2), p0303_a003 (TABLE_ROW suppoe.xpt Example 2 Row 1), p0303_a004 (TABLE_ROW suppoe.xpt Example 2 Row 2), p0303_a014 (TABLE_HEADER oe.xpt Example 3 — also had duplicate OESTRESN), p0304_a025 (TABLE_HEADER oe.xpt Example 4)
findings_added.rule_violation: R10 strict no-paraphrase violation; v1.3 NEW2 char-level scan §D explicitly notes 'misses adjacent Latin-Latin swap' limitation (Q→O is exactly such adjacent key); v1.3 NEW8 substring n-gram §H should have caught OESEO ∉ canonical CDISC variable list (OESEQ ∈ canonical) — writer either (a) skipped NEW8 self-validate step 6 OR (b) NEW8 oracle missing OESEQ canonical SUPPQUAL Identifier set
findings_added.repair_action: Option H bulk targeted fix (cycle 1) — Python in-place replacement OESEO → OESEQ across 8 atoms + co-located OESTRESN | OESTRESN → OESTRESN | OESTRESU in a014 TABLE_HEADER (visual eye-skip on similar OESTR-prefix tokens). Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_31a.jsonl.pre-OptionH-OE-corruption-bulk.bak. Post-fix: 0 OESEO remaining; 8 OESEQ canonical present; a014 verbatim verified against PDF p.303 ground truth (oe.xpt Example 3 columns OESEQ + OELNKID + ... + OEORRESU + OESTRESC + OESTRESN + OESTRESU + OELOC ...)
findings_added.v1_4_codification_candidate: v1.4 NEW8 oracle expansion: writer/executor MUST cross-check every uppercase token in TABLE_ROW Identifier-cell (IDVAR cell of SUPPQUAL) AND every TABLE_HEADER column-name token against canonical CDISC variable list per parent domain; for SUPPQUAL: IDVAR ∈ {<DOMAIN>SEQ, <DOMAIN>GRPID, <DOMAIN>SPID, <DOMAIN>LNKID, <DOMAIN>LNKGRP, <DOMAIN>REFID}; for spec TABLE_HEADER: column-name set ∈ canonical Variable Name set per SDTMIG v3.4 §6.x Specification tables. Mandatory pre-DONE write hook with halt-on-violation OR Option H auto-fix proposal. Joins round 5 v1.4 candidate stack (G-MS-NEW-5-1 through G-MS-NEW-5-6).
findings_added.writer_family_motif: Joins round 3 batch 21 CPSCMRKS↔CPCSMRKS adjacent-letter swap motif (caught by NEW8 substring n-gram per drift cal verbatim hash overlap); first INTRA-batch occurrence in P1 cumulative for OE-domain Identifier-cell systematic corruption; previously bounded to single-atom defect (round 3) now scales to 8-atom systematic cluster (round 6 batch 31). Severity HIGH because data corruption impacts downstream RAG retrieval / KB consumer joins to canonical SUPPQUAL spec — silent semantic failure motif (per slot #40 silent-failure-hunter AUDIT-mode reflection).

findings_added.category: writer-family NEW2 char-level scan substitution list incomplete — Cyrillic У → Latin U homoglyph
findings_added.title: Cyrillic У → Latin U homoglyph in 2 OE-Spec TABLE_HEADER atoms (OEORRESУ where OEORRESU should be)
findings_added.scope: 2 TABLE_HEADER atoms within §6.3.7.5 OE oe.xpt spec tables: ig34_p0302_a021 (oe.xpt Example 2 columns) + ig34_p0304_a025 (oe.xpt Example 4 columns). Both atoms had OEORRESУ (with Cyrillic У U+0423) in column position where OEORRESU (Latin U U+0055) is the canonical CDISC OE Variable Qualifier name.
findings_added.rule_violation: v1.3 §D NEW2 single-character iteration self-validation step 7: 'scan for Cyrillic-Latin homoglyph substitution (Cyrillic А Е О Р С Т Х → Latin A E O P C T X) — if found, replace with Latin'. Substitution set DOES NOT INCLUDE Cyrillic У (U+0423), so writer self-validate inert on this character. R10 strict verbatim default would say 'preserve PDF as-is' BUT canonical CDISC variable name list has OEORRESU with Latin U (NOT Cyrillic), so PDF-side appearance of Cyrillic У is a PDF-rendering artifact (not editorial choice), and NEW2 should have substituted.
findings_added.repair_action: Option H bulk targeted fix (cycle 1, co-applied with O-P1-101) — Python in-place replacement OEORRESУ → OEORRESU using UTF-8 byte-precise substring match. Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_31a.jsonl.pre-OptionH-OE-corruption-bulk.bak (same backup as O-P1-101). Post-fix: 0 Cyrillic У remaining in either batch 31 file.
findings_added.v1_4_codification_candidate: v1.4 NEW2 substitution list expansion: extend Cyrillic-Latin homoglyph set from current 7 chars (А Е О Р С Т Х) to 11+ chars including К М Н В **У** (and possibly Ѕ І Ј Ѕ uppercase variants); rationale: Cyrillic alphabet has more Latin-look-alikes than the original 7; canonical CDISC variable names use Latin letters only, so any Cyrillic homoglyph in identifier position is a PDF-rendering artifact requiring auto-substitution. Implementation: v1.3 self-validate step 7 char dictionary {'А':'A','Е':'E','О':'O','Р':'P','С':'C','Т':'T','Х':'X', '+ К':'K', 'М':'M', 'Н':'H', 'В':'B', 'У':'U'}.
findings_added.writer_family_motif: Adjacent to O-P1-101 (writer transcribed PDF rendering literally without NEW2 substitution); distinct because PDF source genuinely contains Cyrillic У glyph (v.s. O-P1-101 where writer added Q→O slip not in PDF). Severity MEDIUM because (a) homoglyph defect identified by structural sweep BEFORE merge to root, and (b) NEW2 list extension is straightforward 4-char addition; writer would auto-correct first-attempt with v1.4 list.

findings_added.category: writer-family stale-template-fillin VALUE HALLUCINATION motif extension (round 5 O-P1-85 VALUE HALLUCINATION extended to multi-axis IDVAR + QNAM corruption)
findings_added.title: SUPPQUAL Example 3 multi-axis stale-template fillin: 2 atoms with IDVAR=OESEO (should be OELNKID) + QNAM=OEEDILST/OAEYLDTC (should be OEEVLDTC) — writer wrote stale prior-table values rather than transcribing from current table
findings_added.scope: 2 atoms within §6.3.7.5 OE Example 3 suppoe.xpt (the second SUPPQUAL table on p.303, NOT Example 2's first SUPPQUAL): ig34_p0303_a023 (Row 1) + ig34_p0303_a024 (Row 2). PDF p.303 ground truth: IDVAR=OELNKID + QNAM=OEEVLDTC for both rows. Writer wrote: a023 IDVAR=OESEO + QNAM=OEEDILST; a024 IDVAR=OESEO + QNAM=OAEYLDTC.
findings_added.rule_violation: R10 strict verbatim violation on TABLE_ROW value cells (multi-axis); writer-family failure mode: stale-template fillin where writer carried over prior table's IDVAR (OESEQ which itself was Q→O corrupted to OESEO) and QNAM (OEEDILST from prior Example 2 suppoe.xpt) AND additionally hallucinated OAEYLDTC (letter-jumbled from OEEVLDTC). NEW8 substring n-gram self-validate inert because OEEDILST IS canonical (just wrong table); OAEYLDTC NOT canonical but writer didn't self-validate. NEW2 char-level inert (no homoglyph involved).
findings_added.repair_action: Option H targeted fix (cycle 1, co-applied with O-P1-101+102) — Python in-place replacement 'OESEO | 1 | OEEDILST' → 'OELNKID | 1 | OEEVLDTC' for a023; 'OESEO | 2 | OAEYLDTC' → 'OELNKID | 2 | OEEVLDTC' for a024. Both verified against PDF p.303 Example 3 suppoe.xpt ground truth (IDVAR=OELNKID + QNAM=OEEVLDTC + IDVARVAL=1/2 + QLABEL='Evaluation Date' + QVAL='2012-04-30'). Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_31a.jsonl.pre-OptionH-OE-corruption-bulk.bak.
findings_added.v1_4_codification_candidate: v1.4 NEW8.d codification (round 5 O-P1-85 candidate extension): TABLE_ROW value-cell verbatim integrity check beyond single-cell to whole-row context. Writer/executor MUST cross-check each TABLE_ROW value-cell against (a) parent TABLE_HEADER column type expectation (e.g. IDVAR column expects canonical Identifier name), AND (b) per-table-context coherence (rows within same TABLE_HEADER should share consistent IDVAR domain conventions). For SUPPQUAL: IDVAR cell value MUST appear in parent domain's Identifier set (OE: OESEQ/OEGRPID/OESPID/OELNKID/OELNKGRP/OEREFID); QNAM cell value MUST appear in parent domain's Variable Name set OR be a non-standard variable explicitly flagged. Mandatory pre-DONE write hook with halt-on-violation OR Option H auto-fix proposal.
findings_added.writer_family_motif: Joins round 5 O-P1-85 NEW VALUE HALLUCINATION motif (writer fabricated USUBJID/PCREFID/PCTESTCD on p.270 drift cal probe); extends from drift-cal-rerun context to MAIN-LINE production batch context (round 5 was rerun-only; round 6 batch 31 is FIRST main-line occurrence). 2nd recurrence within 2 rounds = formal v1.4 codification mandatory. Severity HIGH because multi-axis corruption is more pernicious than single-cell (downstream RAG/KB consumers will fail JOINS on multiple variable-name keys simultaneously).
